expected.notes: H-1B petition is approved (not pending), so h1b_pending_no_travel must not fire despite stage being h1b and user planning travel.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'h1b_pending_no_travel', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.petition_status eq pending
  - answers.stage eq h1b
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
